user.title: Sign in to ČEZ
user.description: Enter your login details for the ČEZ Distribuce portal (dip.cezdistribuce.cz). You can use either email + password, or callback URL/code from browser sign-in (WSO2 Identity Server, e.g. Google/Apple).

select_supply_point.title: Select supply point
select_supply_point.description: Multiple supply points were found. Select the one you want to monitor.

select_hdo_signal.title: Select HDO signal
select_hdo_signal.description: {signal_count} HDO signals were found. Select the one that matches your tariff (you can find it in your contract or invoice).

error.invalid_auth: Invalid login details. Check your email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to ČEZ API. Please try again.
error.no_supply_points: No supply point associated with this account was found.
error.missing_auth_data: Provide either a password or browser callback URL/code.
error.too_many_auth_methods: Use only one method: password or browser callback URL/code.

abort.already_configured: This supply point (EAN) is already configured.
